known_values.description: DESCRIPTION: Flicker mixes gold and silver palms, crackling stars, blue breaks, green glitter, and sea-blue flashes - playful shimmer in motion.

candidate_records.identity_check: strong product identity via name+brand+known category

candidate_records.value: This stunner is much more than just a Flicker! Blue, green, gold and glitter effects burst into the night sky from this 14-shot beast, crackling and booming all the way. Your celebration will be much more than just a Flicker in the night when you incorporate this dazzler into your display!
candidate_records.identity_check: strong product identity via name+brand+known category
